productName: Const Rosin AIO Hype 2.0 Device Black Domina 1g
description: An all-in-one indica disposable vape preloaded with Black Domina oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of pepper, spicy/herbal, and woody, delivering a heavy, relaxed body calm.
